zh.lifeSummary: 當Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain於大約1165年出生在英國威爾斯波斯蒙哥馬利時，她的父親Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain22歲，母親Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan22歲。她和Trahaearn ap Iorwerth至少有6個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain于大约1165年出生在英国威尔斯波斯蒙哥馬利时，她的父亲Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain22岁，母亲Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan22岁。她和Trahaearn ap Iorwerth至少有6个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain was born about 1165, in Montgomery, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, was 22 and her mother, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, was 22. She had at least 6 sons and 3 daughters with Trahaearn ap Iorwerth.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain est née environ 1165, à Montgomery, Powys, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, avait 22 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles avec Trahaearn ap Iorwerth.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain um 1165 in Montgomery, Powys, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain 22 und ihre Mutter Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan 22. Sie hatte mit Trahaearn ap Iorwerth mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain è nata il circa 1165 nel Montgomery, Powys, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, aveva 22 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie con Trahaearn ap Iorwerth.

ja.lifeSummary: Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewainが約1165年にイギリスウェールズポウイスモントゴメリーで生まれた時，父Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewainは22歳，母Efa ferch Maredudd Fychanは22歳であった。彼女はTrahaearn ap Iorwerthとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain(이)가 대략 1165년 영국 웨일스 파우이스 몽고메리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 Trahaearn ap Iorwerth(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain nasceu aproximadamente 1165, em Montgomery, Powys, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, tinha 22 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas com Trahaearn ap Iorwerth.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain родилась около 1165 г. в местности монтгомири, поуис, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, 22. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери от Trahaearn ap Iorwerth.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dyddgu verch Maredudd of Cedewain nació aproximadamente 1165, en Montgomery, Powys, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Maredudd ap Robert Lord of Cedewain, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Efa ferch Maredudd Fychan, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas con Trahaearn ap Iorwerth.
